audience_shift.from: Prompt-to-deck feels fast but hard to trust.
audience_shift.to: An artifact-driven workflow can make agent-created decks easier to review and improve.

throughline: Trustworthy slide generation needs source evidence, audience fit, visual QA, and honest export boundaries.

beats.transition: Start with the gap between finished-looking slides and trustworthy presentations.
Name the trust problem before describing the pipeline.
Show the artifact order and the claim ledger as the accuracy spine.
Explain how file-backed state makes the work resumable.
Move from planning to what the browser can actually inspect.
Set honest boundaries on exports and future orchestration.
Close with the principle that makes the workflow worth testing.
